channel.title: Xor on giordii
channel.description: Recent content in Xor on giordii

item.title: RevMe
item.description: Reverse a three-step transformation (reverse + rotate + XOR) applied to a 36-byte target symbol to recover the flag.

item.title: ASMR — Static XOR Reverse Engineering
item.description: Reverse a static XOR encryption: subtract flag bytes from key bytes position-by-position to recover the plaintext.

item.title: SSA0x42 — XOR Key Recovery from Known-Plaintext PCAP Headers
item.description: Two known-plaintext byte sequences (k and l) from the PCAP header XOR to reveal the repeating key. XOR the encrypted flag block with that key to recover the plaintext.
